title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Power Grid Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
